name: Three Flavored Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raw shrimp - deveined and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Set ingredients prepared and measured on the stove in the order listed.
2. Place wok over high heat for 30 seconds, then swirl in half the oil. Count to 20, add green onions and ginger, and brown lightly.
3. Add shrimp. Stir-fry for 3 minutes, then season with salt.
4. Add eggs. Scramble until not quite cooked. Remove to a warm plate.
5. Swirl remaining oil into the wok, count to 20, then add pork and chicken. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add rice, soy sauce, and pepper. Stir and toss until heated through.
7. Add scrambled eggs and lettuce. Stir and toss until mixed.
8. Serve immediately before the lettuce wilts.
